name: Sanctuary
description: A bastion of safety built from your happiest memories. Warm light spills from every window.

name: Hope City
description: Crystal spires that shimmer with possibility. The streets hum with plans not yet made.

name: The Ruins
description: Collapsed towers of what once was. Shadows move where joy once lived.

name: Worry Works
description: Smokestacks belching anxiety into the air. Assembly lines of worst-case scenarios.
